name: Tofu Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup rolled oats (or whole grain bread crumbs or crushed cornflakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
3. Press the mixture into a greased teflon loaf pan (spray with PAM if desired).
4. Bake for one hour, or until set and golden brown on top.
5. Allow the loaf to cool in the pan for 15-20 minutes before removing it from the pan.
6. Slice and enjoy!
This loaf also freezes well. I slice it up, wrap the sliced loaf in wax paper and plastic wrap, and store it in the freezer. If you slice the loaf into 9 one-inch slices using rolled oats, each slice contains approximately 150 calories.
